ideation: This animation sequence aims to express the gentle warmth and serenity associated with the sun peeking from behind a small cloud.  The robot will use a slow, upward sweeping motion with both arms, as if gently caressing the sun. This will be achieved using a combination of joint1 and joint2 movements, with subtle wrist adjustments to enhance the expressive quality of the gesture. The overall feeling should be one of calm and peaceful observation. Frame 1 will start with both arms slightly raised and angled outward, palms facing upward, as if anticipating the sun's appearance. Frame 2 will continue the upward movement, with the arms slightly curving and rotating towards the robot's head, like a gentle embrace. Frame 3 will showcase the peak of the gesture, with arms fully raised, palms facing the "sun", and a slight inward rotation to add a sense of warmth and protection. Frame 4 slowly lowers the arms back to a relaxed position, mimicking the feeling of the moment passing.

frames.beat: arms gently lift, palms open to the sky
arms sweep upward, embracing the light
arms reach high, basking in the sun's warmth
arms slowly lower, the moment fades
